comments.text: "enugh" should be "enough" in the quotation from [Er93].
This constant (assuming it exists) is now recorded as $C_{17}$ in the optimization problems repository.
Just for the tidbit, A connection of this problem with [627] has been established by I. Araujo, R. Filipe and R. Miyazaki in [AFM25]. (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
